case_title: TEDDY M. PINTO VS. HANDY DAN INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-28-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HANDY DAN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PINTO, TEDDY M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANDY DAN INC. $7,230.00 PRINCIPAL, $107.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,337.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
